description:
Advances: specled.triangulation

Deliverable:
SpecLedEx.CoverageTriangulation.findings/3 pure function over (coverage_records, closure_map, tag_index); emits branch_guard_untested_realization, branch_guard_untethered_test (default :info severity, per-test opt-out via @tag spec_triangulation: :indirect), branch_guard_underspecified_realization; execution_reach metric rendered as "N/M (0.FF)"; detector_unavailable: :no_coverage_artifact graceful degrade when .spec/_coverage/per_test.coverdata is missing; Scenario 2 integration test (scenario_test_only_change_test.exs completion — S1 shipped the half) and Scenario 5 integration test (scenario_mistagged_test_test.exs); mix spec.triangle <subject.id> Should-Have diagnostic (read-only per-requirement binding/closure/exercising-tests/execution_reach print).

Verification:
- Tests to pass:
  - mix test test/specled_ex/coverage_triangulation_test.exs
  - mix test test/integration/scenario_test_only_change_test.exs --include integration
  - mix test test/integration/scenario_mistagged_test_test.exs --include integration
  - mix test test/mix/tasks/spec_triangle_test.exs
- Behaviors to demonstrate:
  - specled.triangulation.scenario.untethered_test_flagged
  - specled.triangulation.scenario.opt_out_tag_suppresses
  - specled.triangulation.scenario.cold_run_detector_unavailable
  - specled.triangulation.scenario.test_only_change_scenario_gate (Scenario 2)

Allowed touches:
- lib/specled_ex/coverage_triangulation.ex
- lib/mix/tasks/spec.triangle.ex
- test/specled_ex/coverage_triangulation_test.exs
- test/integration/scenario_test_only_change_test.exs
- test/integration/scenario_mistagged_test_test.exs
- test/mix/tasks/spec_triangle_test.exs

Out of Scope (files):
- lib/specled_ex/coverage/** (S4a)
- lib/mix/tasks/spec.cover.test.ex (S4a)
- lib/specled_ex/realization/**

Out of Scope (intent):
- findings/3 MUST be a pure function — no filesystem I/O, no Mix globals.
- Do NOT emit speculative triangulation findings when coverage_artifact is missing; emit exactly one detector_unavailable and stop.
- Do NOT remove the :indirect opt-out tag; per-test override is required (decision: m4 severity default).
- mix spec.triangle MUST be read-only; it does not write state.json.

Merge gate:
- [ ] Code compiles cleanly
- [ ] Tests listed above pass
- [ ] mix spec.check passes with triangulation enabled on fixture
- [ ] Scope check: diff touches only Allowed globs
- [ ] Auditor APPROVE comment on the ticket

IMPLEMENTED

Log: ~/.claude-personal/projects/-Users-mz-src-specled-ex/ce848bb2-776b-45dd-8a95-99afe283908a.jsonl

Commit: 043fe75d0e5980d14a6cd3ec279b5afc675afc39
Files touched:
- lib/specled_ex/coverage_triangulation.ex (new)
- lib/mix/tasks/spec.triangle.ex (new)
- test/specled_ex/coverage_triangulation_test.exs (new, 15 tests)
- test/integration/scenario_test_only_change_test.exs (new, 2 tests)
- test/integration/scenario_mistagged_test_test.exs (new, 3 tests)
- test/mix/tasks/spec_triangle_test.exs (new, 3 tests)
- .spec/specs/triangulation.spec.md (status: draft -> active; execute flags flipped)
- .spec/state.json (regenerated by mix spec.check)

Tests added:
- SpecLedEx.CoverageTriangulationTest (purity, detector_unavailable, untested_realization, untethered_test + opt-out, underspecified_realization, execution_reach)
- Mix.Tasks.SpecTriangleTest (happy path, unknown subject, usage error)
- SpecLedEx.Integration.ScenarioTestOnlyChangeTest (Scenario 2)
- SpecLedEx.Integration.ScenarioMistaggedTestTest (Scenario 5 — untethered + opt-out)

Verification stubs flipped:
- mix test test/specled_ex/coverage_triangulation_test.exs
- mix test test/integration/scenario_test_only_change_test.exs --include integration
- mix test test/integration/scenario_mistagged_test_test.exs --include integration
- mix test test/mix/tasks/spec_triangle_test.exs

Summary: findings/3 is a pure function over (coverage_records, closure_map, tag_index). When coverage_records is :no_coverage_artifact it emits exactly one detector_unavailable finding (reason :no_coverage_artifact); otherwise it emits branch_guard_untested_realization, branch_guard_untethered_test (:info severity, with per-test @tag spec_triangulation: :indirect opt-out + tag_index.opt_out opt-out), and branch_guard_underspecified_realization. Each finding carries the subject's execution_reach rendered as "N/M (0.FF)". mix spec.triangle <subject.id> is a read-only per-requirement diagnostic that degrades gracefully when the tracer manifest or coverage artifact is absent and never mutates state.json.

Local sanity: mix compile --warnings-as-errors clean; mix test 350/350 passing (full suite); the four ticket-listed test targets pass (23 tests total across them). mix spec.check: the 5 prior triangulation-subject warnings are gone; 9 pre-existing warnings remain on specled.expanded_behavior_tier and specled.use_tier (scope of q59.7 and q59.8, not q59.6) — this is the same spec.check state that q59.4 and q59.5 shipped in.

VERIFY: PASS
Session: agent-a90732fc8778eed62 (subagent under parent session ce848bb2-776b-45dd-8a95-99afe283908a)
Log: ~/.claude-personal/projects/-Users-mz-src-specled-ex/ce848bb2-776b-45dd-8a95-99afe283908a/subagents/agent-a90732fc8778eed62.jsonl

Mechanical checks:
- Files touched: 8
- Files outside Allowed globs: 2 (`.spec/specs/triangulation.spec.md` — status:draft->active + execute:false->true on the subject's own spec, canonical post-implementation update matching prior S3b/S4a pattern; `.spec/state.json` — regenerated artifact whose diff only removes the 5 triangulation warnings. Both allowable per ticket verifier instructions.)
- Files matching Out-of-Scope globs: 0 (no `lib/specled_ex/coverage/**`, `lib/mix/tasks/spec.cover.test.ex`, or `lib/specled_ex/realization/**` touched)

Semantic checks:
- Spec stubs run: 4, passed: 4 (coverage_triangulation_test 15/15; scenario_test_only_change_test 2/2; scenario_mistagged_test_test 3/3; spec_triangle_test 3/3 — 23 total)
- Requirements with passing tests: 7/7 (pure_function, untested_realization, untethered_test + indirect opt-out + tag_index.opt_out, underspecified_realization, detector_unavailable_on_missing_coverage, execution_reach_metric, spec_triangle_task all covered)
- Intent-level scope concerns: none. findings/3 pure (grep confirms no File.*, IO.*, Mix.*, :ets.*, spawn, GenServer, Process., Agent., :persistent_term in coverage_triangulation.ex); :no_coverage_artifact branch returns exactly one detector_unavailable finding and short-circuits before any branch_guard_* emission; :indirect opt-out honored both via per-record tag (`opt_out_tag?/1`) and tag_index.opt_out set; mix spec.triangle is read-only (grep confirms no File.write*, no SpecLedEx.write_state, no state.json mutation — the task test asserts `refute File.exists?(Path.join(root, ".spec/state.json"))` after a run)
- Project verification (mix spec.check): runs to completion; triangulation warnings: 0 (all 5 prior warnings cleared); pre-existing warnings on other subjects: 9 (6 on specled.expanded_behavior_tier, 3 on specled.use_tier — exact baseline expected per verifier instructions, q59.7/q59.8 scope). Exit is non-zero because of those pre-existing warnings; that is baseline, not introduced by this ticket.

Verdict: PASS

Notes: findings/3 signature and contract match spec exactly. Module header carries `# covers:` comments for all six requirements. `execution_reach_map/2` is an exposed helper for the Mix task to render the metric even when no findings fire — not a scope expansion, it delegates to the same private `execution_reach/2` used by findings/3. The Mix task uses Mix.raise for usage/unknown-subject errors (appropriate for a Mix task); this is not a purity violation of the CoverageTriangulation module, which is separately pure. No new finding codes added beyond the four specified (`branch_guard_untested_realization`, `branch_guard_untethered_test`, `branch_guard_underspecified_realization`, `detector_unavailable`) — matches finding-code-budget decision.

AUDIT: APPROVE
Session: agent-a0b538b90dce25ea1 (audit subagent under parent ce848bb2-776b-45dd-8a95-99afe283908a)
Log: ~/.claude-personal/projects/-Users-mz-src-specled-ex/ce848bb2-776b-45dd-8a95-99afe283908a/subagents/agent-a0b538b90dce25ea1.jsonl

Reasoning: Each of the five `must` requirements is tested by an assertion that would fail if the requirement were violated. `specled.triangulation.pure_function` — `test/specled_ex/coverage_triangulation_test.exs:14` counts :erlang.processes() before/after and `:30` asserts determinism; module grep (File./IO./Mix./:ets/spawn/Process./GenServer/Agent./:persistent_term/Task.) returns zero hits. `specled.triangulation.untested_realization` — `coverage_triangulation_test.exs:67` feeds coverage hitting only lib/b.ex while subject_a.req1 closure is lib/a.ex and asserts `subject_id="subject_a"`, `requirement_id="subject_a.req1"`, `"lib/a.ex" in closure_files`. `specled.triangulation.untethered_test` — `coverage_triangulation_test.exs:120` asserts `observed_owners==["subject_b"]` when test is tagged `subject_a.req1` but coverage exercises only lib/b.ex, plus severity=="info"; opt-out proven at `:147` (per-record `spec_triangulation: :indirect`) and `:167` (tag_index.opt_out); integration mirror at `scenario_mistagged_test_test.exs:75`. `specled.triangulation.underspecified_realization` — `coverage_triangulation_test.exs:193` tags test for subject_b.req1 yet coverage crosses into lib/a.ex and asserts the subject_a finding with `"lib/a.ex" in exercised_files`. `specled.triangulation.detector_unavailable_on_missing_coverage` — `coverage_triangulation_test.exs:46` matches exactly one finding with code/reason/severity and `:56` refutes any branch_guard_* speculative output; module's first `findings/3` clause at line 98 short-circuits before any other emission path. Intent scope audit: `lib/specled_ex/coverage_triangulation.ex` is pure (grep-clean for fs/process/Mix primitives, confirmed by reading the 438-line file end-to-end); `lib/mix/tasks/spec.triangle.ex` has no File.write*/SpecLedEx.write_state/state.json mutation and `spec_triangle_test.exs:38` asserts `refute File.exists?(Path.join(root, ".spec/state.json"))`. Ran all four verification commands myself: 15/15 + 2/2 + 3/3 + 3/3 = 23/23 pass. Scope check on the two outside-Allowed files: `.spec/specs/triangulation.spec.md` diff is only `status: draft->active` + three `execute: false->true` flags on the subject's own spec (the canonical post-implementation promotion — S3b q59.4 and S4a q59.5 shipped the same kind of change, and this ticket's Summary explicitly lists "`.spec/specs/triangulation.spec.md` (status: draft -> active; execute flags flipped)"); `.spec/state.json` diff is only the removal of the 5 triangulation `surface_target_missing` warnings that existed pre-commit because the module/task/test files did not yet exist, plus a `findings: 14 -> 9` counter update (pure regeneration, no unrelated mutation). Procedural nit (not bounce-worthy): prior S-tickets split the spec-flip into its own commit (74083ea, e074a10) whereas q59.6 bundles it, but the content change is identical to those flip commits and the ticket's IMPLEMENTED comment disclosed the file upfront. No Out-of-Scope (files) globs touched (`lib/specled_ex/coverage/**`, `lib/mix/tasks/spec.cover.test.ex`, `lib/specled_ex/realization/**` all clean).

title: S4b: coverage × closure × tags triangulation
